productDisplayName: Nike Men Trainng Navy Blue Track Pant
description: Composition Dark grey trackpants made of 100% polyester, is engineered with Therma-Fit technology, has an eleasticated waistband with a drawcord, two pockets on the sides, reinforced seam lines, an embroidered nike swoosh on the left thigh and toggles on the hemline Fit Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash in cold water Do not iron, bleach or dry clean Line dry nike specializes in high-end sportswear. This trackpants from Nike is created with the Therma-Fit technology, using a fabric that is densely constructed to retain body heat and obstruct wind and cold. This moisture-wicking sport wear can be worn during intense warm-up sessions or for your regular gymming. Pair it with a Nike sweatshirt and sports shoes.
